article_meta.title: Kid Rock Buries Bad Bunny in TMZ's Post-Super Bowl Halftime Show Poll 31 Chris Graythen/Getty ImagesWarner Todd Huston11

reasoning: Mostly solid: it flags several real author-level biases and avoids most quotes, but it includes quoted phrases within one flagged span and misses multiple clear biased phrasings elsewhere. One label choice is debatable.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Item 2 embeds quoted source language inside the flagged span, a minor attribution violation; other items are from author prose.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: All flagged items reflect genuine bias in the author’s prose; none are clearly neutral or solely from sources.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple clear instances: 'gossip site TMZ,' 'Fans did not fall for the push…', 'frontloaded the poll,' 'strange turn of events,' and additional mind-reading about what TMZ 'thought.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels are mostly appropriate (Spin, Mind Reading, Omission of Source Attribution, Subjective Adjectives). The 'TMZ tried its best to lead its fans' item is better classified as Mind Reading/Slant than Sensationalism.
